title: Pick-up
subtitle: New room-nights booked in the selected window. Green is good — steady inflow means healthy demand.

empty.window: No new bookings in this window.

chart.title: Daily pick-up
chart.subtitle: Bars show new nights added per day; the line shows cumulative nights within this window.

recent.title: Recent bookings
recent.subtitle: Last few bookings created in this window.
recent.empty: Nothing new yet — promotions can help lift pick-up.
